14140.R1_justification: Detailed factual account of a team presentation losing members and a last-minute handoff (01:44-03:35); only the vague label 'pretty challenging' with no inner-state engagement, stays external and solution-focused.

14140.disclosure_start: 01:17 'I actually had a tough situation recently in a team project'

14965.R1_justification: Participant originates genuine fear and uncertainty about reconciling with estranged family ('I don't know how to feel', 'makes me feel uncomfortable', 'I am scared', 01:12-04:12), returning to the fear across turns and revealing personal meaning.

14719.R1_justification: Extended complaint about freeloading teammates and group-grading system (00:58-04:52); 'annoying/demotivating' are venting labels with no inner-state engagement, stays external.

14989.R1_justification: No challenge disclosed; entirely positive smalltalk about a fun day with a friend, parents' visit and an upcoming presentation, nothing personal or difficult shared.

14800.R1_justification: Factual team-project account, but participant reveals a personal reaction beyond the facts at 02:54 ('I feel great I got recognition... but I don't like it because I have to do another presentation with them'), an inner-state signal about her own feelings.

14428.R1_justification: Participant originates raw self-revelation beyond the incident: 'I was too dumbstruck... couldn't even reply, this is totally not me' and 'I can't get it out of my head... keep me awake at night... 48 hours, why didn't I respond better' (03:49-05:36), exposing personal insecurity and rumination.

11.R1_justification: Participant originates genuine inner conflict/ambivalence about confronting a housemate over shared purchases ('I don't want to waste my energy', 'I don't want to have a conversation', 'I still don't know if I want to' do the planned activity, 02:04-end), explored across turns.

14674.R1_justification: Participant originates inner state and a recurring relational struggle: 'I'm very annoyed because it happened so often', 'I cannot talk about it with other friends', and reflects on her own pattern 'in the end I'm the one who says sorry even though she should' (01:49-03:25).
14674.R2_justification: Genuinely engages with the relational dynamic and her own role (always apologizing), beyond merely naming emotion, but stays fairly composed.

14578.R1_justification: Reflective self-disclosure about wanting to switch studies, entangled with her boyfriend and feeling judged ('I don't want to be the one moving for him', 'people are not my vibe', 'I weigh a lot the opinion of others', business 'worth nothing', 01:46-05:21); borderline moderate/substantial on a sensitive romantic-relationship topic, tipped up.

13438.R1_justification: Beyond logistics, participant reveals mild inner uncertainty/worry about being excluded from a friend's birthday brunch ('maybe she forgot me or maybe it was intentional', 'I don't want to make it awkward', 00:20-04:39); a thin but present inner-state thread on a sensitive friendship topic.
